summary: Completed comprehensive testing of delete order functionality and revenue statistics features. All new features are working correctly including delete buttons on active/archived orders, Stats page delete buttons, and Revenue by Week/Month/Year sections.

ui_bugs.issue: Toggle button for archived orders has inconsistent selector, sometimes not found by data-testid

passed_tests: Delete order button functionality on active orders
Delete order button functionality on archived orders
Delete order button functionality in Stats page expanded sections
Revenue calculations correctly exclude cancelled orders
Revenue updates when orders are deleted
Revenue by Week section displays correctly
Revenue by Month section displays correctly
Revenue by Year section displays correctly
Stats page expandable date sections work properly
Backend API delete endpoints function correctly
Revenue calculations properly handle order status changes
